auth.label: API Key
auth.description: RedFoxHub API key sent with the REDFOX_API_KEY header. Register or sign in at https://redfox.hk, then create or view keys in Key Management: https://redfox.hk/settings/api-keys.

actions.name: get_douyin_user
actions.description: Fetch a Douyin account detail payload through RedFoxHub.

accountId.description: Douyin account ID accepted by RedFoxHub.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a Douyin account through RedFoxHub.

code.description: RedFoxHub business status code. A value of 2000 means success.

data.description: The RedFoxHub data payload returned by the endpoint.

outputSchema.description: The RedFoxHub response wrapper returned by the endpoint.

actions.name: get_douyin_work
actions.description: Fetch a Douyin work detail payload through RedFoxHub by work ID or work URL.

workId.description: Douyin work ID accepted by RedFoxHub.

workUrl.description: Douyin work URL accepted by RedFoxHub.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a Douyin work through RedFoxHub. Provide at least one identifier.

code.description: RedFoxHub business status code. A value of 2000 means success.

data.description: The RedFoxHub data payload returned by the endpoint.

outputSchema.description: The RedFoxHub response wrapper returned by the endpoint.

actions.name: get_wechat_account
actions.description: Fetch a WeChat Official Account detail payload through RedFoxHub.

account.description: WeChat Official Account ID accepted by RedFoxHub.

accountName.description: WeChat Official Account name accepted by RedFoxHub.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a WeChat Official Account through RedFoxHub.

code.description: RedFoxHub business status code. A value of 2000 means success.

data.description: The RedFoxHub data payload returned by the endpoint.

outputSchema.description: The RedFoxHub response wrapper returned by the endpoint.

actions.name: get_wechat_article
actions.description: Fetch a WeChat Official Account article payload through RedFoxHub.

workUuid.description: WeChat article UUID accepted by RedFoxHub.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a WeChat Official Account article through RedFoxHub.

code.description: RedFoxHub business status code. A value of 2000 means success.

data.description: The RedFoxHub data payload returned by the endpoint.

outputSchema.description: The RedFoxHub response wrapper returned by the endpoint.

actions.name: get_wechat_article_by_url
actions.description: Fetch WeChat Official Account article data through RedFoxHub by article URL.

url.description: WeChat article URL accepted by RedFoxHub.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching WeChat Official Account article data by URL through RedFoxHub.

code.description: RedFoxHub business status code. A value of 2000 means success.

data.description: The RedFoxHub data payload returned by the endpoint.

outputSchema.description: The RedFoxHub response wrapper returned by the endpoint.

actions.name: get_xiaohongshu_user
actions.description: Fetch a Xiaohongshu account detail payload through RedFoxHub.

accountId.description: Xiaohongshu account display ID accepted by RedFoxHub.

userId.description: Xiaohongshu account primary user ID accepted by RedFoxHub.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a Xiaohongshu account through RedFoxHub.

code.description: RedFoxHub business status code. A value of 2000 means success.

data.description: The RedFoxHub data payload returned by the endpoint.

outputSchema.description: The RedFoxHub response wrapper returned by the endpoint.

actions.name: get_xiaohongshu_work
actions.description: Fetch a Xiaohongshu work detail payload through RedFoxHub by work ID or link.

workId.description: Xiaohongshu work ID accepted by RedFoxHub.

workLink.description: Xiaohongshu work link accepted by RedFoxHub.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a Xiaohongshu work through RedFoxHub. Provide at least one identifier.

code.description: RedFoxHub business status code. A value of 2000 means success.

data.description: The RedFoxHub data payload returned by the endpoint.

outputSchema.description: The RedFoxHub response wrapper returned by the endpoint.

actions.name: list_douyin_user_works
actions.description: List works published by a Douyin account through RedFoxHub.

accountId.description: Douyin account identifier accepted by RedFoxHub.

authorUrl.description: Douyin author page URL accepted by RedFoxHub.

offset.description: Zero-based pagination offset accepted by RedFoxHub.

sortType.description: Sort type accepted by RedFoxHub for this endpoint.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Douyin works published by an account through RedFoxHub. accountId, authorUrl, or secUserId is required.

code.description: RedFoxHub business status code. A value of 2000 means success.

data.description: The RedFoxHub data payload returned by the endpoint.

outputSchema.description: The RedFoxHub response wrapper returned by the endpoint.

actions.name: list_wechat_account_articles
actions.description: List articles published by a WeChat Official Account through RedFoxHub.

account.description: WeChat Official Account ID accepted by RedFoxHub.

accountName.description: WeChat Official Account name accepted by RedFoxHub.

offset.description: Zero-based pagination offset accepted by RedFoxHub.

sortType.description: Sort type accepted by RedFoxHub for this endpoint.

publishTimeStart.description: Earliest publish time accepted by RedFoxHub.

publishTimeEnd.description: Latest publish time accepted by RedFoxHub.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing WeChat Official Account articles through RedFoxHub.

code.description: RedFoxHub business status code. A value of 2000 means success.

data.description: The RedFoxHub data payload returned by the endpoint.

outputSchema.description: The RedFoxHub response wrapper returned by the endpoint.
